ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-16-299955 Conservatorship of Virginia Daves Hook and PTR-17-300583 The John Bertrand & Virginia Daves Hook Trust.

Appearances: Erika Yuen appeared by zoom for Conservator/Trustee).

The Court stated that it reviewed the papers and that it does not have any questions. Ms. Yuen requested a 120-day continuance stating that they were having a little problem getting a hold of MetLife, that MetLife is refusing to communicate by e-mail, phone or fax, and that they will only respond to written correspondence which has been provided, but they have not responded. The Second Account of Conservator, etc. and the Second Account of Trustee, etc. are are under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petitions. Status on filing of the final accountings are set for January 20, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard concurrently:
PCN-16-299955 Conservatorship of Virginia Daves Hook
PTR-17-300583 In RE: John Bertrand & Virginia Daves Hook Revocable Trust

Appearances:
Erika Yuen for Conservator and Trustee.

Ms. Yuen stated that when the accounting was due to be filed in November, the Conservatee entered hospice care, lost 20 pounds, is currently sleeping over 20 hours a day, that the Conservatee is now stable, and request continuance until March for accounting to end in December. The Court noted the accounting should be 2-year period, in this case ending in September. The Status on filing of 2nd account is continued to February 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Robles. Not reported.
